title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hero MotoCorp
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
